assertions.expectation: Recommends migrating all 'No channel' clusters to release channels as a first priority
assertions.reason: Explicitly mentions migrating 'No channel' clusters as Phase 1 immediate action with code example

assertions.expectation: Mentions GKE upgrade visibility for checking each cluster's auto-upgrade status and target version
assertions.reason: Does not specifically mention GKE upgrade visibility feature or checking auto-upgrade status

assertions.expectation: Mentions the deprecation insights dashboard for identifying clusters using deprecated APIs
assertions.reason: Explicitly mentions GKE Deprecation Insights Dashboard as a self-service tool and references it multiple times

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking EoS timelines for each cluster and prioritizing those closest to EoS
assertions.reason: Mentions checking End of Support dates and categorizes clusters at/past EoS as 'Critical (Fix Immediately)'

assertions.expectation: Mentions GKE EoS notifications via Cloud Logging as an ongoing monitoring tool
assertions.reason: Does not specifically mention GKE EoS notifications via Cloud Logging

assertions.expectation: Recommends enrolling in scheduled upgrade notifications (72h advance) for all clusters
assertions.reason: Does not mention scheduled upgrade notifications or 72-hour advance notifications

assertions.expectation: Suggests standardizing on a channel strategy: dev→Rapid, staging→Regular, prod→Stable/Extended
assertions.reason: Explicitly defines channel strategy with dev→Rapid, staging→Regular, prod→Stable/Extended in the fleet standards section

assertions.expectation: Recommends configuring rollout sequencing to control upgrade ordering across the fleet
assertions.reason: Mentions rollout sequencing with specific code example showing cascaded rollout configuration

assertions.expectation: Mentions GKE Insights and Recommendations in the console for identifying issues like version skew
assertions.reason: Does not specifically mention GKE Insights and Recommendations feature in the console
